queryList.1: hp_master: /*FORCE_MASTER*/ select user_id,user_name,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,user_Invitation_code,user_code,user_ali_open_id, create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_nick,role_id,user_status,user_salt,user_push_token,bs,audit_status,real_name, delivery_new_user_status,user_push_token,user_email,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,user_email_mask ,country,calling_code,is_tip_show,reg_area_id,new_user_status from user where user_name_mask = '151jrok0629' and role_id=0 and is_del=0

queryList.3: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,user_id,device_id,create_time,update_time FROM device_login_info WHERE (device_id = '9BC80942-C8CB-4AA1-8044-2D9F66924CE2') ORDER BY update_time DESC limit 99
queryList.4: hp_master: UPDATE device_login_info SET user_id=1398716816, device_id='9BC80942-C8CB-4AA1-8044-2D9F66924CE2', create_time=1753681701454, update_time=1755229446941 WHERE rec_id=6222
queryList.5: hp_master: select ac.address_config_id as addressConfigId, ac.country_name as countryName, ac.province_name as provinceName, ac.city_name as cityName, ac.special_city_mark as specialCityMark, haf.fence_latlng as fenceLatLng, haf.fence_name as fenceName from address_config ac left join hp_area_fence haf on haf.city_id = ac.address_config_id where ac.is_del = 0 and (haf.id > 0 or ac.special_city_mark = 1)
queryList.6: hp_master: INSERT INTO user_log ( login_ip, user_id, user_type, macId, user_name, accessToken, expiresIn, refresh_token, create_time, device_id, user_name_mask ) VALUES ( '157.15.28.49', 1398716816, 0, '381e71d6949d486249d1068620ab9c2f', '151jrok0629', '6eab40858990f37a2b3ba73fda6fdb51', 15811200, 'acda2b3bfb24076ca554a330720b000c', 1755229447005, '9BC80942-C8CB-4AA1-8044-2D9F66924CE2', '151jrok0629' )
queryList.7: hp_master: select * from hp_user_reg_send_member where mobile_mask = '151jrok0629' limit 1
queryList.8: hp_master: select a.id, a.`name`, a.long_lat_list from hp_delivery_consumer_area as a, city_config as b where a.is_del = 0 and a.type = 1 and a.city_id = b.city_id and b.is_del = 0 order by b.sort desc
